name: Chicken Makhani (Butter Chicken)
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Chicken, skinless, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix yogurt, ginger, salt, and red food coloring in a bowl. Rub the mixture into the chicken pieces and let marinate overnight.
2. Place the marinated chicken in an ovenproof dish and brush with oil. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 40-50 minutes. Save any liquid that forms.
3. In a saucepan, melt butter over medium heat. Add cinnamon, cloves, cardamoms, and bay leaf. Fry for 1 minute.
4. Stir in sour cream and the saved chicken liquid. Add crushed saffron and cream. Cover and simmer gently for 5-6 minutes.
5. Add the chicken pieces to the sauce and adjust seasoning with salt. Stir in ground almonds.
6. Dissolve cornstarch in water and add it to the sauce. Cook until thickened, about 3-4 minutes.
7. Remove from heat. Serve hot with naan bread.
Serving Ideas: Naan provides a delightful accompaniment for this dish.
